name: API Suggestion
about: Suggest a new public or fake API to be added to the handbook.
title: "[API] <API Name>"
labels: new-api
assignees: ''

---

**API Name:**
(e.g., PokeAPI)

**Base URL:**
(e.g., https://pokeapi.co/api/v2/)

**Why should this be added?**
(Explain the learning value of this API)

**Does it require an API Key?**
(Yes/No)
